items.title: GitHub Acknowledges Recent Outages, Cites Scaling Challenges and Architectural Weaknesses

items.title: Presentation: Dynamic Moments: Weaving LLMs into Deep Personalization at DoorDash
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Dynamic Moments: Weaving LLMs into Deep Personalization at DoorDash. Sudeep Das and Pradeep Muthukrishnan explain the shift from static merchandising to dynamic, moment-aware personalization at DoorDash.

items.title: Article: Redesigning Banking PDF Table Extraction: A Layered Approach with Java
items.summaryShort: Article: Redesigning Banking PDF Table Extraction: A Layered Approach with Java. PDF table extraction often looks easy until it fails in production.

items.title: Cloudflare Introduces Project Think: A Durable Runtime for AI Agents
items.summaryShort: Cloudflare Introduces Project Think: A Durable Runtime for AI Agents. Cloudflare's Project Think introduces a new framework for AI agents, shifting from stateless orchestration to a durable actor-based infrastructure.

items.title: Designing Memory for AI Agents: Inside Linkedin’s Cognitive Memory Agent
items.summaryShort: Designing Memory for AI Agents: Inside Linkedin’s Cognitive Memory Agent. LinkedIn introduces Cognitive Memory Agent (CMA), generative AI infrastructure layer enabling stateful, context-aware systems.

items.title: Revolut eyes valuation of up to $200B in eventual IPO
items.summaryShort: Revolut eyes valuation of up to $200B in eventual IPO. Fintech giant Revolut, which secured a full banking license in the U.K.

items.title: With US spy laws set to expire, lawmakers are split over protecting Americans from warrantless surveillance
items.summaryShort: With US spy laws set to expire, lawmakers are split over protecting Americans from warrantless surveillance. Some lawmakers are calling for widespread reforms following years of surveillance scandals and abuses across successive U.S.
